entry.title: New IDC DEEE0008027 awarded to AMERESCO, INC. for the amount of $5,000

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: Contact DOE IDIQ Contracting Officer at FEMP@ee.doe.gov.

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: IGF::OT::IGF DEPARTMENT OF ENERGY, FEDERAL ENERGY MANAGEMENT PROGRAM, ENERGY SAVINGS PERFORMANCE CONTRACT INDEFINITE DELIVERY, INDEFINITE QUANTITY

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:legislativeMandates.ns1:otherStatutoryAuthority: 42 U.S.C. SECTION 8287, ET SEQ. - ENERGY SAVINGS PERFORMANCE CONTRACTS

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: FAR 52.223-4 & BIO-BASED & ENERGY EFFICIENT & ENVIRONMENTALLY PREFERABLE

entry.title: IDC DEEE0008027 (2) awarded to AMERESCO, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: Contact DOE IDIQ Contracting Officer at FEMP@ee.doe.gov.

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
DOE FEDERAL ENERGY MANAGEMENT PROGRAM, ESPC IDIQ CONTRACT
THE PURPOSE OF THIS BILATERAL MODIFICATION IS TO EXTEND THE ORDERING PERIOD OF PERFORMANCE. ___

entry.title: IDC DEEE0008027 (3) awarded to AMERESCO, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: Contact DOE IDIQ Contracting Officer at FEMP@ee.doe.gov.

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
DOE FEDERAL ENERGY MANAGEMENT PROGRAM, ESPC IDIQ CONTRACT
THE PURPOSE OF THIS BILATERAL MODIFICATION IS TO INCORPORATE FAR CLAUSE 52.204-27, AND TO CHANGE THE CONTRACTING OFFICER AND CONTRACT SPECIALIST. ___

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: FAR 52.223-4 & BIO-BASED & ENERGY EFFICIENT & ENVIRONMENTALLY PREFERABLE

entry.title: IDC DEEE0008027 (4) awarded to AMERESCO, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: Contact DOE IDIQ Contracting Officer at FEMP@ee.doe.gov.

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
DOE FEDERAL ENERGY MANAGEMENT PROGRAM, ESPC IDIQ CONTRACT
THE PURPOSE OF THIS BILATERAL MODIFICATION IS TO EXTEND THE ORDERING PERIOD OF PERFORMANCE, CHANGE THE COR, AND MAKE MINOR CHANGES TO THE CONTRACT BODY. ___

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: FAR 52.223-4 & BIO-BASED & ENERGY EFFICIENT & ENVIRONMENTALLY PREFERABLE
